overview: Gatuno is a professional admin web panel for a ride-hailing and delivery platform. Built with a dark theme and green accents, it gives administrators full visibility and control over rides, drivers, users, and platform settings in real time.
features: Real-time dashboard with KPI cards and 7-day revenue chart
Live ride feed with auto-refresh and color-coded status badges
Rides management with filters (All, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled)
Drivers list with online/offline toggle and search
Users list with colored avatars, search, and registration dates
Settings page for pricing, ride configuration, and feature toggles
Dark theme with #00C853 green accents and professional styling
All content in Brazilian Portuguese with realistic mock data
